classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框为圆形零件正面测力面的机械安装视图，含孔径与数量标注如'2 x ⌀5 深6'、'⌀12 深4'、'6 x M4 深6（均布）'、'⌀70'、'⌀80'，以及角度'47.5°'、'30°'、'17.5°'和'6P航空插座'安装位置；未给出针脚功能或接线定义，因此归入机械尺寸。

title.title_zh: 正面测力面安装尺寸图
title.title_en: Front Force Measuring Face Mechanical Dimension Drawing

text_annotations.correction_note: OCR read FV; corrected to Fy+ based on visible force-direction label.
Merged split callout and normalized diameter/depth notation.
OCR read 124; corrected to Φ12 深4 from visible callout.
OCR read 6xM√6; corrected to 6 x M4 depth 6 from visible threaded-hole callout.

terminology_notes: Φ denotes diameter; 深 denotes depth.
translation_notes: 6-pin aviation socket translated as 6针航空插座.

dimension_records.reason: Visible arrow label indicates positive Fy direction, not a dimensional value.
Angular dimension shown on circular layout near top of front view.
Leader points to side connector, text identifies connector type.
Split OCR boxes form one hole callout with quantity, diameter and depth.
Visible label marks positive moment direction, not a dimension.
Angular dimension shown on right side of circular layout.
Visible arrow label indicates positive Fx direction, not a dimensional value.
OCR misread the visible diameter-depth callout, but context and nearby leader support Φ12 深4.
Leader points to outside circular boundary, indicating outer diameter.
Visible callout identifies equally distributed M4 mounting holes with depth 6; OCR contained overlapping fragments that were discarded.
Leader points to bolt-circle construction line, indicating pitch circle diameter.
Text labels the view rather than a dimension.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Front face includes 6 x M4 threaded mounting holes depth 6 on Φ70 pitch circle, plus 2 x Φ5 depth 6 and Φ12 depth 4 hole callouts.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: 6-pin aviation socket is identified by leader callout.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: 47.5° and 8 are visible in the image but have no corresponding OCR source_id, so they were not added as text annotations.

unresolved_items.item: 47.5° angular callout visible but no OCR source_id available; cannot output as annotation under source-id constraint.
unresolved_items.reason: No corresponding OCR source_id.

unresolved_items.item: 8 dimension near connector visible but no OCR source_id available; cannot output as annotation under source-id constraint.
unresolved_items.reason: No corresponding OCR source_id.

unresolved_items.item: ocr_011 text 7！ discarded as overlapping noise within Φ12 深4 callout area.
ocr_013, ocr_015, ocr_016 discarded as duplicate/fragment OCR inside corrected 6 x M4 深6 callout already represented by ocr_014.

labels.label_text_original: 传感器自带的M4内六角螺丝
labels.translation_en_full: M4 hex socket screw supplied with sensor

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框为背面安装面视图，显示圆形安装结构、孔位、角度分布和尺寸标注，如'Φ70'、'2 x Φ 5 ▽ 4'、'185°'、'220°'、'235°'、'305°'及传感器自带M4内六角螺丝说明；全图中该黄色标记区域对应同一背面安装面尺寸图，不含针脚功能或性能曲线。

records.translation_en_full: M4 hex socket screw supplied with sensor

text_annotations.correction_note: Corrected spacing from OCR text M4hexsocketscrew; overlapping fragment OCR boxes discarded.
Corrected OCR ?70 to Φ70 based on visible diameter symbol.
Corrected partial OCR 8 to visible angular callout 80°.
Merged split callout; corrected OCR 尘 to depth/countersink-style symbol ▽ and normalized spacing.
Corrected missing degree symbol from OCR 185 to visible 185°.
Corrected hyphen spacing from OCR Back-mounting; overlapping fragment OCR boxes discarded.

terminology_notes: Angular callouts are preserved in degrees.
▽ in the hole callout is treated as a depth/countersink-style symbol based on drawing context.
translation_notes: Back - mounting translated as 背面安装面.
M4 hex socket screw translated as M4内六角螺丝.

dimension_records.reason: Leader note identifies the included screw type rather than a dimensional value.
Angular marking around the mounting face defines the zero-degree reference.
Visible angle callout on the bolt-hole pattern.
Diameter callout points to the circular outside profile.
Visible angle callout on the mounting face.
OCR captured only part of the callout, but the visible annotation reads 80°.
Split OCR fragments form one leader callout for two holes; symbol interpretation is based on the visible callout.
Visible angle callout on the mounting face.
Visible angle callout on the mounting face.
Visible angle callout on the mounting face; OCR omitted the degree symbol.
Text is the drawing view label, not a dimension.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: Back mounting face with angular positions called out at 0°, 355°, 305°, 80°, 115°, 220°, and 185°; additional visible 65° and 235° callouts lack reliable OCR source boxes and are unresolved.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Not specified in this cropped back mounting view.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: M4 hex socket screw note is present; connector-specific dimensions are not specified in this crop.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: 65° and 235° are visibly present but cannot be output as final annotations because no reliable OCR source_id is available for them; OCR noise and overlapping fragments were removed.

unresolved_items.description: Visible 65° angular callout has no reliable OCR source_id in the provided OCR boxes; ocr_009 is a low-confidence noise-like partial read and was not used.
Visible 235° angular callout has no corresponding OCR source_id in the provided OCR boxes.
OCR boxes ocr_002, ocr_003, and ocr_004 are overlapping fragments of T001 and were discarded.
OCR boxes ocr_022, ocr_024, and ocr_025 are overlapping fragments of T011 and were discarded.
OCR boxes ocr_016, ocr_017, and ocr_018 are duplicate or noise fragments within the 2 x Φ5 ▽ 4 callout area and were not used separately.
ocr_007 appears to be a spurious line/geometry read near the 355°/0° area and was discarded.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标框为传感器侧面视图，包含外形轮廓、侧向安装/凸出结构、指示灯引出标注，以及尺寸'6'、'26'和视图名称'侧面'；可见'STATUS'、'DOA'、'L/A'仅作为面板指示文字，没有针脚编号与功能接线对应，因此最接近机械结构尺寸类。

terminology_notes: DIGA and L/A are preserved as visible interface or indicator labels because no reliable expansion is specified in the crop.
translation_notes: Indicator light translated as 指示灯; Side translated as 侧面视图.

dimension_records.reason: Leader points to an indicator light feature; this is a functional label rather than a dimensional value.
Vertical text on the connector/sensor side identifies an indicator or status marking.
Visible vertical label adjacent to indicator circles; retained as an independent interface/indicator marking.
Visible vertical label adjacent to indicator circles; retained as an independent interface/indicator marking.
Leader points to the screw feature; this identifies the mounting screw type.
Bottom horizontal dimension line indicates a local side thickness value.
Bottom horizontal dimension line indicates the main side body thickness.
Text labels the drawing view rather than a part dimension.

engineering_summary.mounting_interface: M4 hex socket screw is called out for the side mounting/interface feature.
engineering_summary.shaft_and_key_interface: Not specified in this side crop.
engineering_summary.overall_envelope_and_clearance: Visible side dimensions include 6 mm local thickness and 26 mm main body thickness.
engineering_summary.connector_considerations: Visible indicator/interface markings include STATUS, DIGA, and L/A near circular indicator symbols.
engineering_summary.missing_or_unresolved_data: No tolerances, datum references, hole specifications, or material details are specified in this crop.

classification.category_basis: 用于识别机械结构尺寸类图纸，包括电机/零部件外形轮廓、长宽高、轴径、轴长、键槽、法兰、安装孔、孔距、定位尺寸、三视图、剖视图、局部放大视图、公差、形位公差、基准符号、连接器/线缆/插头的物理安装位置或外形位置。若图中仅展示连接器型号、端子型号、线束走向、接口外形位置，但没有明确的引脚编号、针脚功能、线色或接线表，也归入本类。
classification.reason: 目标裁剪区域显示力传感器的三维外形、顶面孔位、侧面连接器安装位置以及'Fz+'、'Mz+'、'Fx+'、'Fy+'等力和力矩方向标识，属于机械结构视图与安装/方向示意，不含针脚功能表或性能曲线。

quality_control.origin_src_semantics: 5x crop before structure border trim; backend original data image
quality_control.target_src_semantics: structure-only crop after border trim; backend processed data image

items: 抽查 5x 裁切图清晰度和结构图去边效果
抽查 AI 命名、分类、标签合并、完整翻译和简单翻译质量
抽查 v2 JSON 是否满足后台拆解对比和人工复核需要
